trivia_bullets.text: Murders at Karlov Manor (set code MKM, released 2024-02-09) is a murder-mystery set on the plane of Ravnica, centered on Alquist Proft and the Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations (R.A.M.I.). Unlike previous Ravnica sets, the focus is on cross-guild detective work rather than guild warfare. [Scryfall], [magic.wizards.com: Planeswalker's Guide to Murders at Karlov Manor]

Flavor text: "Every week, the necropsy lab's unclaimed bodies are transferred to the Golgari for 'recycling.'" The quote establishes a bureaucratic handoff pipeline from the city's forensic institutions to the Golgari Swarm — the guild defined by death-and-rebirth ecology — with the scare-quotes on 'recycling' doing double duty as dark humor and indictment. [Scryfall]

The creature type is Insect, consistent with Golgari's predilection for vermin and arthropod creatures used as recyclers and scavengers in the death-ecology hierarchy. [Scryfall type_line], [MTG Wiki: Golgari Swarm]

Its ability triggers whenever creature cards LEAVE the graveyard (not just enter), rewarding sacrifice loops, reanimation, and exile-from-graveyard effects — a narrower and more technical graveyard trigger than most Golgari staples. Legal in pauper, commander, pioneer, and modern as of 2024. EDHREC rank 20,847 — low, indicating it sees modest commander play. [Scryfall legalities], [Scryfall edhrec_rank]

related_cards.name: Golgari Rot Farm
related_cards.note: The 'Rot Farm' in the card name refers to this iconic Golgari dual land — the shared name anchors the creature to the guild's agricultural-death identity

related_cards.name: Lotleth Troll
related_cards.note: Iconic Golgari graveyard-synergy creature from a prior Ravnica block; functional comparator for graveyard-matters design

related_cards.name: Alquist Proft, Master Sleuth
related_cards.note: The set's detective protagonist — represents the city institution that feeds unclaimed bodies to the Golgari per the flavor text
